$meta.purpose: Manifest of the extracted design system rules for Cloudflare Support Portal

title: Cloudflare Support Portal Design System

philosophy.summary: Core brand personality, UI mood summary, and high-level design principles governing color, typography, density, and interactive aesthetics.

color.summary: Light and dark mode tokens for brand, semantic elements, sidebars, charts, and text-to-surface color pairings.

typography.summary: Font families, base configurations, and text hierarchy settings (sizes, weights, leading) used across headers, menus, and body copy.

spacing.summary: Layout grid gaps, padding rules, and layout structures for consistent page rhythm and spacing scales.

radius-elevation.summary: Corner roundness scale definitions and elevation levels (flat surface vs hover floating shadow cards).

motion.summary: Smooth interactive durations, easings, keyframe setups, and rules of restraint regarding transitions.

components.summary: Tailwind utility recipes, size variants, state transitions (hover, active, disabled, focus) for buttons, inputs, cards, and dropdowns.

layout.summary: Global application layout shell specifications (Sidebar width, Header height, grids, and responsive stacking breakpoints).

style.summary: Consolidated design tokens mapping colors, typography, radius, spacing, and transition constants.

howToUse: To recreate or build pages conforming to this design system: 1. Read philosophy.json first to align with the core principles. 2. Fetch color.json to map light/dark styles to semantic containers. 3. Check typography.json and spacing.json for font hierarchy and layout rhythm. 4. Match components.json specs for building buttons, inputs, and interactive widgets.
